statement: Workflow action retries and handler replay can re-execute batch polling and result application, amplifying non-idempotent inserts.
rationale: processWorkflow enables retryActionsByDefault with maxAttempts; workflow handler is replayed after each step completes. Action steps (polling, provider calls) can retry in the workpool.
keyAssumptions: pollOpenAiBatchAction or submitBatch steps are configured as actions and can retry.
validationCriteria: Observe workflow steps with multiple attempts or repeated action runs.
Correlate retries with duplicate rubric inserts.
critiquePoints: If actions are stable and do not retry, retries may not be a major factor.
questions: Are action retries visible in workflow step logs or workpool metadata?
